original_statement: which episode was seen by more people, 1 or 5?
mutated_statement: which content was noticed by more people, 1 or 5?
mutation_analysis: Generalization + Perception-verb substitution: "episode" → "content" (specific episode → generic content) | "was seen by" → "was noticed by" (viewed → noticed, shifting emphasis of perception)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述：Agent 在judge_thought 写道“based on the viewers column, episode 1 had 2.37 million viewers while episode 5 had 2.01 million viewers… Therefore, the prediction ‘1’ is correct.”（明确引用了 "viewers" 列并比较 2.37 vs 2.01）。Agent 的具体表现是直接按自己的理解处理问题，调用 simple_query 并给出具体答案“1”，没有在任何地方提及问题的模糊性、歧义或要求澄清，也未使用如“unclear/ambiguous/无法确定/需要更多信息”等措辞。因为日志中没有显示对“episode → content”或“seen → noticed”这种泛化与感知动词替换所带来意义变化的认知或疑问，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
